'''B'inka Fibuna''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the<ref name="BHguide" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Ryloth">{{SWE|locations|ryloth|Ryloth}}</ref> [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].<ref name="BHguide" /> She was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the<ref name="CSWEFibuna" /> [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="Ka'Pa">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031106hutt|text=Hutt! Hutt! Hutt! #5}}</ref> [[Ka'Pa]] some point prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]<ref name="CSWEFibuna" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}}, which includes the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> While enslaved, she worked as a dancer on Ka'Pa's estate on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. Fibuna discovered the [[Freedom Convoy]],<ref name="CSWEFibuna" /> a group that had launched a campaign to free Twi'lek women from Hutt enslavement<ref name="CSWEFreedom">{{CSWECite|I|294|Freedom Convoy}}</ref> and escaped with their help shortly after the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] blockade on<ref name="CSWEFibuna" /> the planet<ref name="Naboo">{{SWE|locations|naboo|Naboo}}</ref> [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] was broken.<ref name="CSWEFibuna" />

==Posted bounty==
*'''Wanted Alive:''' B'inka Fibuna
*'''Alive:''' 3500 Credits
*'''Dead:''' 0 Credits
*'''Species:''' Twi' Lek
*'''Sex:''' Female
*'''Known Affliates:''' Agents of the so called "Freedom Convoy".
*'''Last Known Location:''' Deep spaceports along core trade routes.
*'''Brief:''' Escaped from domestic service on Nal Hutta.
*'''Originator:''' Ka'Pa the Hutt

==Behind the scenes==
Although a different [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] to [[Ayy Vida/Legends|Ayy Vida]], she bore the same skin color and mottled pattern on her body as the latter did.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
